description: A photograph depicting a dense stand of broadleaved trees, identified as beech forest, located in Bavaria, Germany. The trees are tall and slender with abundant green foliage, appearing to be uniformly spaced, characteristic of a plantation. Light filters through the canopy, and green undergrowth is visible on the forest floor. The image has a slight motion blur effect. The credits for the photograph are M. Probeck, and the associated filename is "2012-20".
